title: Gulf Corpus Analysis + Roif Paper Mining + Fish-Sign Polysemy Test

roif_akkadian_model.model_type: Proto-Dravidian syllabic + Old Akkadian mnemonic shorthand

gulf_catalogues.failaka_hojlund_2012: Dilmun seals, fish in compound pictorial scenes

polysemy_test.conclusion: Fish sign is exclusively compound across ALL sites (0/113 isolated). Coastal Lothal shows same pattern as inland sites. Polysemy hypothesis cannot be tested in formal stamp seal corpus. Consistent with Martini 2025: commodity tallies on perishable media.
